title: Brazilian animation
body: The history of Brazilian animation is relatively recent. In the first half of the 20th century, there were some small experiments produced in animation without much continuity, to the emergence of several animated films in the other half of the century. The 21st century saw the advent of many animated series for television.
categories: Articles needing translation from Portuguese Wikipedia
